name: db0 Memory & Context Engine
description: Agent-native semantic memory and context management — your agent remembers what matters, even across sessions.

embeddings.label: Embedding Provider
embeddings.help: Embedding provider for semantic search: 'gemini' (free, recommended), 'ollama' (local), 'openai', or 'hash' (zero-config fallback)

agentId.label: Agent ID
agentId.help: Stable identifier for this agent's memory scope (default: 'main')
